name: Quaternary
description: Ice ages, rise of Homo sapiens, megafauna extinctions.

name: Neogene
keyContinentalConfig: Continents near modern positions, Panama Isthmus forms
description: Grasslands spread, hominins diversify, land bridge connections.

name: Paleogene
keyContinentalConfig: India collides with Asia, Atlantic widens
description: Mammals radiate after K-Pg extinction, early primates.

name: Cretaceous
description: Flowering plants appear, dinosaurs dominate, ends with K-Pg mass extinction.

name: Jurassic
keyContinentalConfig: Pangaea breaking apart, Central Atlantic opens
description: First birds, large sauropods, marine reptiles flourish.

name: Triassic
description: First dinosaurs, first mammals, ends with End-Triassic extinction.

name: Permian
description: Synapsids dominate, ends with largest mass extinction in Earth history.

name: Carboniferous
description: Vast coal forests, first reptiles, high oxygen levels.

name: Devonian
keyContinentalConfig: Laurussia + Gondwana separated by narrow ocean
description: Age of Fishes, first tetrapods, first forests.

name: Silurian
description: First vascular land plants, jawed fish diversify.

name: Ordovician
keyContinentalConfig: Gondwana near south pole, isolated continents
description: Great Ordovician Biodiversification Event, ends with mass extinction.

name: Cambrian
description: Cambrian Explosion, most animal phyla appear, trilobites dominate.
